qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('select t0.oi_evento as id, SEC.policy, t0.c_evento, t0.d_evento, t0.oi_escala, t0.oi_tipo_eval, t0.oi_clase_org, t0.c_estado, t0.f_desde, t0.f_hasta, t0.f_cierre from EDD02_EVENTOS as t0, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Eventos.EVENTO\') as SEC join t0.oi_evento LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY id ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('select t0.oi_evento as id, SEC.policy from EDD02_EVENTOS as t0, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Eventos.EVENTO\') as SEC join t0.oi_evento LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY id ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Eventos.EVENTO.QUERY
RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EDD03_EVALUACION.oi_evaluacion, EDD03_EVALUACION.c_estado, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM EDD03_EVALUACION, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN EDD03_EVALUACION.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE EDD03_EVALUACION.oi_evento = {#SOURCE:@oi_evento} {%? (#SOURCE:@c_estado!='') {% and EDD03_EVALUACION.c_estado={#SOURCE:@c_estado} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: APE_Y_NOM
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PE.oi_personal_emp, P.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, PER01_PERSONAL as P JOIN PE.oi_personal inner P.oi_personal WHERE PE.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT E.oi_empresa, CL.oi_clase_org, ES.oi_unidad_org, PE.oi_personal_emp, SP.oi_estructura, SP.l_responsable, PE.oi_posicion_ult FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as E, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as ST, ORG02_CLASES_ORG as CL, ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS as SP, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as ES, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as PE JOIN E.oi_unidad_org inner ST.oi_unidad_org, CL.oi_estructura_org inner ST.oi_estructura, SP.oi_clase_org inner CL.oi_clase_org, SP.oi_personal_emp inner PE.oi_personal_emp, PE.oi_empresa inner E.oi_empresa, SP.oi_estructura inner ES.oi_estructura WHERE PE.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} and CL.l_automatica=1 and CL.c_estado=\'V\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CL.oi_clase_org, ES.oi_unidad_org, PE.oi_personal_emp, SP.oi_estructura, SP.l_responsable, PE.oi_posicion_ult FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as ST, ORG02_CLASES_ORG as CL, ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS as SP, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as ES, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as PE JOIN CL.oi_estructura_org inner ST.oi_estructura, SP.oi_clase_org inner CL.oi_clase_org, SP.oi_personal_emp inner PE.oi_personal_emp, SP.oi_estructura inner ES.oi_estructura WHERE PE.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} and CL.oi_clase_org={#SOURCE:@oi_clase_org} and CL.c_estado=\'V\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS_FINDUP
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ST.oi_estructura FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as ST_C, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as ST JOIN ST_C.oi_estr_padre inner ST.oi_estructura where ST_C.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS_EVALUADOR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ES.oi_unidad_org, PE.oi_personal_emp, PE.oi_posicion_ult FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as ES, ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS as SP, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as PE JOIN SP.oi_personal_emp inner PE.oi_personal_emp, SP.oi_estructura inner ES.oi_estructura where SP.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} and SP.l_responsable=1 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS_SUPERVISOR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ES.oi_unidad_org, PE.oi_personal_emp, PE.oi_posicion_ult FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as ES, ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS as SP, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as PE JOIN SP.oi_personal_emp inner PE.oi_personal_emp, SP.oi_estructura inner ES.oi_estructura where SP.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} and SP.l_responsable=1 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT EDD02_EVENTOS.oi_evento as ID, EDD02_EVENTOS.c_evento as COD, EDD02_EVENTOS.d_evento as DES, EDD02_EVENTOS.c_evento as c_evento, EDD02_EVENTOS.d_evento as d_evento, EDD02_EVENTOS.c_estado as c_estado, EDD02_EVENTOS.f_desde as f_desde, EDD02_EVENTOS.f_hasta as f_hasta, EDD02_EVENTOS.f_cierre as f_cierre, ORG29_ESCALAS.d_escala as DES_oi_escala, EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.d_tipo_eval as DES_oi_tipo_eval, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.d_clase_org as DES_oi_clase_org FROM EDD02_EVENTOS, ORG29_ESCALAS, EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL, ORG02_CLASES_ORG JOIN EDD02_EVENTOS.oi_escala LEFT OUTER ORG29_ESCALAS.oi_escala, EDD02_EVENTOS.oi_tipo_eval LEFT OUTER EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.oi_tipo_eval, EDD02_EVENTOS.oi_clase_org LEFT OUTER ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org WHERE EDD02_EVENTOS.oi_evento in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_DATA_PLANTILLAS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT EDD02_PLANTILLAS.oi_plantilla as ID, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.e_orden FROM EDD02_PLANTILLAS, EDD01_PLANTILLAS JOIN EDD02_PLANTILLAS.oi_plantilla_def INNER EDD01_PLANTILLAS.oi_plantilla WHERE EDD02_PLANTILLAS.oi_evento = {number($PARAM/@ID)} ORDER BY e_orden ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_DATA_ETAPAS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT EDD02_ETAPAS.oi_etapa as ID, EDD02_ETAPAS.f_inicio FROM EDD02_ETAPAS WHERE EDD02_ETAPAS.oi_evento = {number($PARAM/@ID)} ORDER BY f_inicio ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Eventos.PLANTILLA.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT EDD02_PLANTILLAS.oi_plantilla as ID, EDD02_PLANTILLAS.n_ponderacion as n_ponderacion, EDD02_PLANTILLAS.l_habilitada as l_habilitada, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.c_plantilla as COD, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.d_plantilla as DES, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.d_plantilla as DES_oi_plantilla_def, ESC1.d_escala as DES_oi_escala, ESC2.d_escala as DES_oi_escala_item, ESC3.d_escala as DES_oi_escala_subitem FROM EDD02_PLANTILLAS, EDD01_PLANTILLAS, ORG29_ESCALAS as ESC1, ORG29_ESCALAS as ESC2, ORG29_ESCALAS as ESC3 JOIN EDD02_PLANTILLAS.oi_plantilla_def LEFT OUTER EDD01_PLANTILLAS.oi_plantilla, EDD02_PLANTILLAS.oi_escala LEFT OUTER ESC1.oi_escala, EDD02_PLANTILLAS.oi_escala_item LEFT OUTER ESC2.oi_escala, EDD02_PLANTILLAS.oi_escala_subitem LEFT OUTER ESC3.oi_escala WHERE EDD02_PLANTILLAS.oi_plantilla in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Fecha de Inicio de la Etapa
attribute.label: Inicio
attribute.name: f_inicio

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Eventos.ETAPA.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT EDD02_ETAPAS.oi_etapa as ID, EDD02_ETAPAS.c_etapa as COD, EDD02_ETAPAS.d_etapa as DES, EDD02_ETAPAS.c_etapa as c_etapa, EDD02_ETAPAS.d_etapa as d_etapa, EDD02_ETAPAS.c_estado_evento as c_estado_evento, EDD02_ETAPAS.c_estado_eval as c_estado_eval, EDD02_ETAPAS.l_habilitado as l_habilitado, EDD02_ETAPAS.f_inicio as f_inicio, EDD02_ETAPAS.c_rol_habilitado as c_rol_habilitado, EDD02_ETAPAS.c_estado_aceptar as c_estado_aceptar FROM EDD02_ETAPAS WHERE EDD02_ETAPAS.oi_etapa in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW
